scope: Codex-class workflow capability relevant to BeMore Mac/iOS/runtime product direction, not Codex internals or branding

capabilities.evidence: Mac Workspace panel, BeMore runtime snapshot, CLI workspace/files commands
Mac Editor panel and CLI file read/write
Mac Terminal panel and CLI run --wait; output is attached to process records
Mac Review panel and CLI diff show
Mac Artifacts/Buddy/receipt areas and CLI artifacts/receipts/buddy commands
Task create/run, bounded task retry creation, retry counts, failure reasons, and receipt history are implemented in the Mac runtime and CLI
Delegated subtasks are real RuntimeTask records with parentId, childIds, role, command, status, receipts, and CLI/Mac controls; this is not yet parallel multi-agent model execution
Runtime patch preview/apply/reject endpoints, patch records, unified patch previews, task/receipt links, and CLI/Mac Review controls are implemented
Runtime exposes a workspace-bound sandbox session with path enforcement, destructive command blocking, command timeouts, output caps, and receipt logging; VM/container isolation remains future work
